# Chapter 6: Biomechanics  (~110 pp)
- 6.1 Bones, joints, muscles as structures (15) · 6.2 Locomotion: gait, swimming, flight (18) · 6.3 Cardiovascular biomechanics (15) · 6.4 Respiratory biomechanics (12) · 6.5 Cell mechanics: forces a cell exerts and feels (15) · 6.6 Soft-tissue constitutive models (15) · 6.7 Failure section: musculoskeletal injury, orthopaedic implant failure (20)

**Archetype**: balance, scaling, failure. **Project**: instrument a vertical jump; estimate peak force on the knee. **Exercises**: 30.
